blockingIssues.description: The final packet still includes the out-of-scope valuation test edit in `erp-domain/src/test/java/com/bigbrightpaints/erp/truthsuite/runtime/TS_RuntimeInventoryValuationExecutableCoverageTest.java`, so the cleanup-proof feature remains broader than the mission allows.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify that rerun/fix features may continue after an initial targeted baseline failure when the failure is the exact in-scope regression the feature is assigned to repair, provided scoped validators pass after the fix.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The rerun handoff for `catalog-public-surface-retirement` records a Step 1.3 baseline-validation deviation because the first targeted run failed on the exact stale-test regression the rerun was meant to fix, and the worker then repaired it and reran scoped validators successfully.
